---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Artigos técnicos, pesquisas e reflexões"
description-meta: "Blog com artigos técnicos e reflexões"
listing: 
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  page-size: 100
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  contents: 
      - ./
      - post-links.yml
#      categories: [] 
  

#page-layout: full
draft-mode: unlinked
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#posts}
:::
